notes: With-skill achieves 100% pass rate across all 3 evals vs 72.2% baseline — the skill consistently prevents the three failure modes: premature rewrites, full-file dumps, and missing plans

The baseline fails on different assertions per eval: premature rewrite (eval 0), full-file output (eval 1), and missing plan (eval 2) — the skill addresses a range of behavioral failures, not one narrow pattern
Token cost delta is minimal (+910 tokens, ~2.4% increase) — the skill adds almost no overhead
Time delta is +5.8s average — the 'think before coding' discipline adds a small time cost for significantly better behavioral compliance
All assertions that check for 'does NOT do X' (negative assertions) pass 100% with skill — the skill's biggest value is in preventing overreach, not adding capabilities
